tasks.title: Implement Draft Intent Submission & Message Queue
tasks.description: Add API endpoints and storage for draft intent submission. Requesters submit drafts (NO solver_address - open to any solver), ALL solvers poll verifier for ALL pending drafts (polling-based, FCFS approach).
tasks.details: Phase 1 of verifier-based negotiation message queue. Implement draft intent storage (message queue), API endpoints for submission and polling, draft metadata management (id, requester, status, timestamp, expiry). Drafts are open to ANY solver - no solver_address specified. ALL solvers see ALL pending drafts - no filtering. Solvers poll the verifier regularly - verifier does NOT push/forward messages to solvers.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for storage operations, integration tests for API endpoints, verify draft submission and polling works correctly.

subtasks.title: Create storage module for draft intents
subtasks.description: Implement in-memory storage for draft intents using Rust HashMap/BTreeMap
subtasks.details: Create `trusted-verifier/src/storage/draft_intents.rs`. Store draft metadata: id (UUID or hash), requester_address, draft_data (JSON), status (pending/signed/expired), timestamp, expiry_time. Store first signature: solver_address, signature (hex), signature_timestamp. NO solver_address in draft - drafts are open to any solver.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for add/get/update/remove operations, expiry handling

subtasks.title: Implement POST /draft-intent endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint for requester to submit draft intent
subtasks.details: Add endpoint to `trusted-verifier/src/api/negotiation.rs`. Accept JSON: `{ "requester_address": "0x...", "draft_data": {...} }`. NO solver_address - draft is open to any solver. Create draft, return `{ "success": true, "data": { "draft_id": "...", "status": "pending" } }`.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: submit draft without solver_address, verify stored correctly

subtasks.title: Implement GET /draft-intent/:id endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint to get draft intent status
subtasks.details: Add endpoint to retrieve draft by ID. Response: `{ "success": true, "data": { "draft_id": "...", "status": "pending|signed|expired", ... } }`. Return 404 if not found.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: get existing draft, verify status transitions

subtasks.title: Implement GET /draft-intents/pending endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint for solver to poll pending drafts (all solvers see all drafts)
subtasks.details: Add endpoint with NO query params. Return ALL pending drafts (status=pending). Response: `{ "success": true, "data": [{ "draft_id": "...", "requester_address": "0x...", "draft_data": {...} }] }`. This is a polling endpoint - ALL solvers call this regularly (e.g., every 5-30 seconds) to check for new drafts. Verifier does NOT push/forward messages. No filtering - all solvers see all drafts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: submit multiple drafts, verify all solvers see all pending drafts

tasks.title: Implement Signature Submission & Retrieval (FCFS)
tasks.description: Add API endpoints for solver signature submission and requester polling. Multiple solvers can sign same draft, but FIRST signature wins (FCFS). Requesters poll verifier to retrieve first signature.
tasks.details: Phase 2 of verifier-based negotiation message queue. Implement signature storage (first signature only), validation (solver registered on-chain, signature format), and FCFS logic. If draft already signed, reject later signatures with 409 Conflict. Requesters poll the verifier to retrieve first signature (with solver_address) - verifier does NOT push/forward messages.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for signature validation, integration tests for API endpoints, verify signature submission and retrieval works correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /draft-intent/:id/signature endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint for solver to submit signature
subtasks.details: Add endpoint to `trusted-verifier/src/api/negotiation.rs`. Accept JSON: `{ "solver_address": "0x...", "signature": "<hex>", "public_key": "<hex>" }`. Validate solver is registered on-chain (query via `mvm_client`), verify signature format (Ed25519, hex-encoded). **FCFS Logic**: If draft already has a signature, reject with 409 Conflict. If first signature, update draft status to "signed", store signature and solver_address. Return `{ "success": true, "data": { "draft_id": "...", "status": "signed" } }` for first signature, 409 Conflict for later signatures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: submit first signature (success), submit second signature (409 Conflict), verify FCFS logic works

subtasks.title: Implement GET /draft-intent/:id/signature endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint for requester to poll for signature
subtasks.details: Add endpoint to retrieve signature for draft. Response (if signed): `{ "success": true, "data": { "signature": "<hex>", "solver_address": "0x...", "timestamp": ... } }`. Response (if pending): `{ "success": false, "error": "Draft not yet signed", "data": null }` (202 Accepted). Return 404 if draft not found. Returns FIRST signature received (with solver_address of first signer). This is a polling endpoint - requesters call this regularly to check if signature is available.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: poll before/after signature submission, verify correct responses

subtasks.title: Add signature validation logic
subtasks.details: Create validation functions: verify solver is registered on-chain (query via `mvm_client`), verify signature format (Ed25519, 64 bytes hex), verify signature matches registered solver's public key (optional - can defer to on-chain verification). FCFS check: verify draft doesn't already have a signature before accepting.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for validation functions, test invalid signatures, test FCFS rejection, test unregistered solver

tasks.title: Implement Authentication & Authorization
tasks.description: Add authentication and authorization for solver and requester endpoints. Secure API access and prevent unauthorized operations.
tasks.details: Phase 4 of verifier-based negotiation message queue. Implement solver authentication (verify solver owns registered address), optional requester authentication, rate limiting, and request signing for authenticated endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for authentication logic, integration tests for protected endpoints, verify unauthorized access is blocked.

subtasks.title: Implement solver authentication
subtasks.description: Add authentication mechanism to verify solver owns registered address
subtasks.details: Implement challenge-response or signature-based authentication. Solvers sign requests with their private key, verifier verifies against registered public key. Add middleware to protect solver endpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: verify authenticated requests work, unauthenticated requests fail

subtasks.title: Add optional requester authentication
subtasks.description: Implement optional authentication for requesters (for tracking/rate limiting)
subtasks.details: Add JWT tokens or API keys for requester authentication. Optional - can be skipped for MVP. If implemented, use for rate limiting and tracking.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: verify optional auth works, unauthenticated requests still work

subtasks.title: Implement rate limiting
subtasks.description: Add rate limiting per requester/solver to prevent abuse
subtasks.details: Implement rate limiting middleware. Track requests per requester/solver address, enforce limits (e.g., 100 requests/minute). Return 429 Too Many Requests when limit exceeded.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: verify rate limits enforced, verify limits reset correctly

tasks.title: Implement Monitoring & Logging
tasks.description: Add monitoring endpoints and logging for negotiation tracking. Track statistics, success rates, and negotiation history.
tasks.details: Phase 5 of verifier-based negotiation message queue. Implement statistics tracking, negotiation history logging, and monitoring endpoints for observability.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for statistics calculation, integration tests for monitoring endpoints, verify logging captures all events.

subtasks.title: Implement GET /negotiations/stats endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint for negotiation statistics
subtasks.details: Add endpoint to return statistics: total drafts, signed, expired, success rate, average response time. Response: `{ "success": true, "data": { "total_drafts": 100, "signed": 85, "expired": 10, ... } }`.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: create multiple drafts, verify statistics accurate

subtasks.title: Implement GET /negotiations/:draft_id/history endpoint
subtasks.description: Create API endpoint for negotiation history
subtasks.details: Add endpoint to return history of events for a draft: created, signed, expired, etc. Response: `{ "success": true, "data": [{ "event": "created", "timestamp": ... }, ...] }`.
subtasks.testStrategy: Integration test: create draft, submit signature, verify history accurate

subtasks.title: Add comprehensive logging
subtasks.description: Implement logging for all negotiation events
subtasks.details: Log all draft submissions, signature submissions. Track success/failure rates, solver response times. Use structured logging (tracing) for better observability.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify logs capture all events, verify log format is parseable

tasks.title: Update Documentation
tasks.description: Update API documentation and create user guide for verifier-based negotiation message queue (polling-based FCFS approach)
tasks.details: Document new API endpoints, update existing API docs, create user guide for requester and solver integration.
tasks.testStrategy: Review documentation for completeness and accuracy.

subtasks.title: Update docs/trusted-verifier/api.md
subtasks.details: Add documentation for all new endpoints: /draft-intent/*, /negotiations/*. Include request/response examples, error codes, authentication requirements. Document FCFS behavior: drafts open to any solver, first signature wins, 409 Conflict for later signatures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review examples match actual API behavior

subtasks.title: Create docs/trusted-verifier/negotiation-routing.md
subtasks.description: Create user guide for negotiation routing
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive guide covering: requester workflow (submit drafts without solver_address, poll for signatures), solver workflow (register on-chain, poll verifier for ALL drafts, submit signatures). Emphasize polling-based FCFS approach - solvers actively poll the verifier, verifier does NOT push/forward messages. First signature wins, later signatures rejected. Include example code snippets, polling intervals, troubleshooting.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify guide is clear and complete

subtasks.title: Update TESTNET_DEPLOYMENT_PLAN.md
subtasks.description: Update deployment plan to reflect negotiation routing availability
subtasks.details: Update Phase 4 and Phase 5 to note that verifier now provides negotiation message queue (polling-based). Update negotiation flow description to show verifier-based message queue as primary method. Clarify that solvers poll the verifier, not vice versa.
